name: A Taiwanese Tale of Two Cities
overview: A Taipei doctor and a San Francisco engineer swap homes in a daring pact, embarking on journeys filled with trials, secrets and unexpected encounters.

trailers.title: Love Yourself 好好愛自己 - 萬芳 One-Fang｜【雙城故事 A Taiwanese Tale of Two Cities】主題曲 Official MV
